given: The stock table includes rows where batch_number and/or serial_number are NULL (from unparseable inventory codes), and S3 down migration has executed
when: We examine the reconstructed inventory_code values
then: Each value has format location-segment2-segment3 where NULL fields are represented as empty strings (e.g., location--serial if batch is NULL)
architectural_notes: Infra: a contract on reconstruction logic, the down() migration uses COALESCE(batch_number, '') || COALESCE(serial_number, '') to reconstruct, asserted by sampling rows with NULL batch/serial segments on the paired branch. Owner: the Alembic revision (UPDATE statement logic) in the repository/migration layer. Cross-cutting concern: reversibility (R4), nonconforming codes must round-trip correctly.

independence.rationale: AC3 tests that all rows have values; AC4 tests that values have correct format with proper NULL handling
